mapper.sql: id, disabled, role_name, description, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert:
insert into user_role
id,
disabled,
role_name,
description,
created_at,
updated_at,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{disabled,jdbcType=BIT},
#{roleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update user_role
disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT},
role_name = #{roleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated_at = #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update user_role set disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT}, role_name = #{roleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_at = #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
